历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 1649 → 1393 → 1409 → 2379 → 19743. From 2021 to 2023, it stabilized around 1400, slightly shifted to 2379 in 2024, and experienced an abnormal drop to 19743 in 2025 (mainly due to low-scoring majors like Nursing and Public Health lowering the school line). The enrollment plan for Physics Category was 165 in 2021, 154 in 2022, 176 in 2023, 171 in 2024, 178 in 2025, and 179 in 2026, remaining stable between 170 and 179 in recent years, with only a 1-person increase in 2026, indicating minimal expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 8th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, firmly among the top universities nationwide. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is 'somewhat negative,' with 99 events recorded, mainly involving campus safety and teacher ethics. Douyin popularity ranks 19th (high heat), with high short video exposure. Recent reputation sentiment is somewhat negative, which may suppress application psychology. Fifth round discipline evaluation A+: Law, Marxist Theory, Geophysics, Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology; A: Chinese Language and Literature, Business Administration, Biology, Water Conservancy Engineering; A-: Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Stomatology, Civil Engineering, etc., totaling 20 A- and above disciplines, with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Wuhan University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in central China; Guangxi is a southern border province. The school's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangxi has been stable at 170–179 in recent years, with 179 in 2026, maintaining a stable proportion. Popular majors include Computer Science (highly recommended), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), Clinical Medicine (recommended), and Stomatology (recommended), with high popularity. The total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Guangxi in 2026 is approximately 392,000, an increase of about 3.2% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: The abnormal drop in Physics Category in 2025 (19743) was mainly due to low-scoring majors like Nursing and Public Health lowering the overall school line, not a normal fluctuation. The 2026 plan is basically flat, the total number of candidates has increased, and the school's reputation is somewhat negative, but the popularity of hot majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information remains high. It is expected that the 2026 ranking will significantly recover (move forward) from the 2025 drop level, but it will be difficult to fully return to the 2024 level (2379). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 19310, with a range of 18810–19810.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 197 → 237 → 359 → 209 → 191. After a noticeable decline in 2023, it rebounded for two consecutive years in 2024–2025, with a baseline of about 191 in 2025, moving up by about 168 places cumulatively over the past two years. The enrollment plan for History Category was 45 in 2021, 56 in 2022, 51 in 2023, 37 in 2024, and 26 in 2025, showing a trend of annual reduction. In 2026, the plan is 33, an increase of about 27% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion that may slightly ease competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 8th on the main list (9th from 2021 to 2024, rising to 8th from 2025), firmly among the top universities in the country. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is 'somewhat negative', with 99 recorded incidents (3 positive, 64 negative, 32 neutral), mainly involving school management responses, campus safety, teacher ethics, and other public opinion issues. It ranks 19th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with high short video exposure. Recent reputation sentiment is somewhat negative, which may suppress some application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, A+ disciplines include Law, Marxist Theory, Geophysics, and Surveying and Mapping Science. A disciplines include Chinese Language and Literature, Business Administration, Biology, and Water Conservancy Engineering. A- disciplines include Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Geography, Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Stomatology, Civil Engineering, Applied Economics, Theoretical Economics, Journalism and Communication, and Management Science and Engineering, totaling 20 disciplines rated A- or above, demonstrating strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Major popularity is polarized: Law (relatively hot), Economics (divided and wait-and-see), Journalism and Communication (clearly discouraged), Chinese Language and Literature (recommended). In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Guangxi is about 392,000, an increase of about 3.2% compared to 2025 (History Category 119,000 + Physics Category 260,000 = 379,600), intensifying overall competition. Wuhan University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region. Guangxi is a southern border province, and willingness to study across provinces is influenced by regional preferences. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Guangxi has shown a trend of reduction followed by a slight rebound in recent years, with a plan of 33 in 2026, accounting for a relatively small proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous rebound in historical rankings in 2024–2025, the 27% enrollment expansion in 2026 easing competition, the somewhat negative reputation potentially suppressing some application enthusiasm, and the increase in the number of local candidates intensifying competition, the expansion effect and intensified competition offset each other. Based on the 2025 baseline of 191, the minimum ranking is expected to slightly decline to about 232, with a range of 207–257.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Wuhan University's medical programs in Guangxi Zhuang Autonomous Region over the past five years are: 2021: 1649 (planned 16), 2022: 1393 (planned 15), 2023: 1359 (planned 19), 2024: 1443 (planned 10), 2025: 19743 (planned 24). From 2021 to 2024, rankings were stable in the 1359–1649 range with small fluctuations; in 2025, due to the addition of low-score programs such as Nursing (6) and Public Health and Preventive Medicine (5), the minimum ranking dropped significantly to 19743. In 2026, the total medical enrollment plan remains 24, same as 2025, but the program structure undergoes important adjustments: the three high-score programs—Stomatology (8-year), Clinical Medicine (8-year), and Clinical Medicine (5-year)—are canceled, while Stomatology (5+3 Integrated) is added with 2 spots, and Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated) expands from 2 to 5 spots. The absence of high-score programs further lowers the overall admission threshold, and the minimum ranking is expected to continue a slight downward shift.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, one of the first batch of national 985 Project and 211 Project key construction universities, and is selected as a Double First-Class construction university (Category A), with comprehensive strength consistently ranking among the top in the country. Its medical disciplines leverage the advantages of a comprehensive university, with Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, and other programs enjoying high reputations, and it has strong appeal among Guangxi candidates, especially in the South China region.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical programs continue to have high application popularity among Guangxi candidates, especially core programs like Clinical Medicine and Stomatology, which are highly competitive. In 2026, the medical enrollment scale in Guangxi remains the same as in 2025, but after the program structure adjustment, relatively low-score programs such as Nursing and Public Health and Preventive Medicine continue to exist, pulling down the overall minimum ranking. Meanwhile, Stomatology (5+3 Integrated), as a new program, is expected to have a ranking between traditional high-score programs and medium-score programs.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model and analysis of program structure adjustments, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Wuhan University's medical programs in Guangxi in 2026 will be approximately 19943, with a fluctuation range of 19443–20443. Compared to 2025's 19743, the ranking number increases slightly (easier to enter), mainly due to the cancellation of multiple high-score programs in 2026, further lowering the overall admission threshold.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. Tier 1 programs are highly competitive and require rankings near the upper end of the predicted range; Tier 2 programs offer good value for rankings in the middle of the range; Tier 3 Nursing can serve as a stable safety choice.
